caption.full:
Jamie Foxx stars in the officially filmed King Spawn reboot

Production has officially begun on Blumhouse's King Spawn, starring Jamie Foxx as the iconic supernatural antihero. The film has been in development at Blumhouse Productions since 2017. Scott Silver, Malcolm Spellman, and Matt Mixon penned the screenplay.

Send this to your Spawn superfan!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #KingSpawn #JamieFoxx #Blumhouse
caption.firstComment: After nearly a decade in development, it’s thrilling to see Blumhouse finally move—Jamie Foxx stepping into this iconic role feels like the right energy to bring King Spawn to life, and I’m eager to hear which earlier version fans keep returning to in your minds.

facebook.text: Jamie Foxx is officially starring in the King Spawn reboot, which has begun filming at Blumhouse. The project has been in development for nearly ten years and follows detective Twitch Williams. The film enlisted three screenwriters: Scott Silver, Malcolm Spellman, and Matt Mixon. Share your excitement for the film!

youtube.title: Jamie Foxx Stars in King Spawn Reboot Filming Now
youtube.description:
Jamie Foxx stars as the iconic supernatural antihero in Blumhouse's King Spawn reboot, which has officially begun filming. The project has been in development for nearly ten years and features screenwriters Scott Silver, Malcolm Spellman, and Matt Mixon. Creator Todd McFarlane is producing.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
